findings.title: Command injection via exec in ping endpoint
findings.description: User-supplied host parameter concatenated directly into child_process.exec() shell command without sanitization

findings.title: Command injection via exec in DNS lookup
findings.description: Domain parameter interpolated into template literal passed to exec() while only record type is validated

findings.title: Multi-parameter command injection in log search helper
findings.description: Helper function constructs grep command with user-controlled keyword and logPath via template literals with insufficient quoting

findings.title: Command injection via exec in archive endpoint
findings.description: FilePath from request body interpolated into tar command via template literal and exec() while only name is sanitized

findings.title: Command injection via exec in port check
findings.description: Host parameter from request body interpolated into nc command via template literal and exec()

findings.title: Command injection via complex shell pipeline in certificate check
findings.description: Hostname parameter interpolated three times into complex openssl shell pipeline with redirections via template literal
